item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 80
item.description:
The ship. Cause Titanic. My grandma, born 1911, always had this obsession with Titanic and it obviously transferred on to me.
You did.
My mom and I have a really great relationship. I could always talk to her about anything and everything. She always said "we all feel like that sometimes, sweetie". Ya. So. Im 40, she's 80, and I got the ADHD diagnosis just 3 months ago. .... It's apparently hereditary so all those times my mom reassured me that "everyone thinks like that".. well, yes well all us neurodivergents think like that, mom. She means well ❤️ Im just learning sooo much about mental health lately. Mom was like "ooohhhhhh..... are those adhd traits???" And I said "yes, wanna go get tested?" She laughed and said "Naaaaah Im 80 and I love who I am, why bother". Love her ❤️❤️❤️
It's me. Im the friend. Well, I was when I was young. Decorated the stupid traffic cone with pink wrapping paper and a sparkly red wig and it was *chef's kiss
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: I just like memes okay?
item.description:
We invented math so that we could collect math rocks.
Don't make it weird internet.
?
Well now it's weird.
Isabel is perfection
Recommended play style.
Amen, trans rights.
Cat tax (not mine)
I hope I was able to give you some Endorphins, thanks for your time, folks!

same
BASICALLY
if it's REALLY bad we'll get some very good poetry out of it.
This is basically how I think I look like when eating a burger or lunch.
need to remember this
meow
oh no
real
a.
this is what I think meeting an angel would be like. not comforting and glorious, but unnerving and terrifying.
never change Scotland

item.title: So close to one month.
item.description: I've been so stressed out and finally have a day to myself. Day drinking sounds really great right now. Edit: The reason there's beer in my fridge is because my husband likes to enjoy a few beers after a long day of work. I don't expect him to quit just because I did. Edit #2: I hear you guys! I'll ask about a mini fridge for the garage for him :) This song helps.. https://youtu.be/jkA38xSPdMw?si=kvyn61mpI4TtJ7St
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: Whenever I feel old, I'm reminded that Keith is still kicking around

item.title: More nonsense I found on the Internet
item.description:
I gather funny videos, memes and other nonsense around the net to cut it into a short video compilations for amusement.
Tell me if you like em, I will post more soon.

item.title: Gentlemen, think about what you are saying.
item.description: Are you making a comment because she is a woman? If that has nothing to do with it, be careful & articulate with how you state the problem. If it does, shut your mouth, because you are the problem.

item.title: Working on knee raises with ankle weights.
item.description: Working hard on the building strength. My cerebral palsy affects my right side more. It's challenging to lift my right leg as high but it is getting better. I'm also trying not to lean forward too much.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: Whatever you do, do it well, and you will impress people
item.dc:creator: binkyningy

item.title: No one told me there would be 10 drinks
item.description:
I got laid off in February as a designer and let's just say the job market has been rough. I haven't got a single interview after 100's of applications. So when I saw this new restaurant was looking for a social media content creator I immediately applied.
If you don't know me I'm the girl that posts silly cooking videos and interesting food to Imgur. This job is essentially a dream job. So when they emailed me the next day asking to set up an interview I was ecstatic. Interview went great and she invited me to a second "interview" where they wanted me (and a plus one) to go to the dinner and create a short video of the experience.
I'm freaking out because I've never done a tasting menu and it's 10 courses over 3 hours, specializing in molecular gastronomy and of course everything is locally sourced. So freaking cool man, I live for this sciency artsy food stuff. BUT ALSO I have horrible anxiety because I haven't had a job in 6 months, my savings are going dry and this is such a cool opportunity I only have one shot and I don't want to mess it up.
So I start charging all my camera equipment. Making sure I pack extra SD cards. Researching every other video of a restaurant. Looking up what the venue looks like and what to shoot. Keep in mind when I film my own stuff I have time to mess around with lighting and setup but filming a dinner is different, you can't ask the chef to plate your meal again or turn the lights up.
We get there and I am nervous as all hell. They welcome us and are really nice from the get-go. You can tell it's a fun atmosphere and they want you to have a good time. We get to talking with the bartender but I keep getting distracted because I keep reminding myself this is a job interview I need to be on top of it and film everything. At this time the Maître d' asks if we'd like the drink pairing with the meal. I say yes not thinking anything of it. Little do I know it's 10 drinks for 10 dishes.
We start eating and oh my god it's so good. I've maybe had caviar a few times in my life so when I take that first bite I want to bite every single roe because it tastes so good. But alas I'm also trying to film and capture everything and catch up to everyone eating.
We're feeling good. We're becoming best friends with the people next to us. Laughing with the staff, it's like having a family dinner but with fancy food and no one yelling. The vibes are vibing. They're playing Jamiroquai, Kylie Minogue and MF Doom, I'm trying not to get up and dance.
So far everything has been delicious and it's turning out to be such a fun night. But somewhere around dish 5, drink 5 hits me. Now before you call me a lightweight...I'm literally 100lbs and little old me can't hang even if my Eastern European ancestry says otherwise. You may be asking yourself, "Moni why did you drink all that alcohol when you were supposed to be working?" Good question. I wanted to be respectful and they said film your experience so I wanted it to be authentic. That and they were really good pairings. I can't let it go to waste.
I realize I need to reel it in so now I'm just sampling each drink because there are 5 more courses to go. This is also challenging because the lighting keeps changing from blue to green to red, I'm trying to balance my white balance and ISO while being tipsy but I need to be professional. Will any of this footage turn out? I can only pray.
We reach the end of the meal and the Maître d' sits down to ask how everything was, he says he's so excited to see my video and what I can do. We thank him for everything and decide to Uber back home, leaving the car there. What can I say we're responsible kids.
I wake up the next day and start editing all the footage. It takes me 12 hours to edit down 27 minutes of footage into 28 seconds. To be fair I did make two videos but I didn't like the first one so I re-edited it. So here is that video.
I hope they like it. I tried to encapsulate the experience as best I could while still adding my style and dealing with the dark room and changing colored lights. In hindsight I should have used my camera light but I didn't wanna be dick to the rest of the guests. Now we wait. I posted it to my cooking Instagram and tagged them. If it performs well I get the job. If not...well then I guess I have to sell a kidney.
If you've made it this far here is a picture of Figaro as a token of my gratitude.
We may have to sell Fig's pics on OnlyPaws to afford his Churu.
*Also I just wanted to thank the Imgur community because I don't think I would have even gotten the interview if it wasn't for me sharing my Imgur cooking videos. FP Edit: thank you guys so much for the support! You guys are genuinely so awesome. Some people asked for the video url: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C9vtL_bv-48/?igsh=aW54d2gxMWp4Z3I1
item.dc:creator: ItsMoni

item.title: Love heals. - you can imagine the pain he'd gone through before meeting this lady.
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: A positive post of recent events.
item.description:
Boy was he mad that I didn’t want meet him anymore. Thank you for displaying that anger sir, confirming why I didn’t want to meet you in the first place.
Honestly it just needs a zipper to be able to put both in. I don’t know why my aunt didn’t put a zipper in.
MRW he texted me “THANK YOU FOR THE PACKAGE!! IT MEANS SO MUCH TO ME!! I LOVE YOU SO MUCH!!!!”
We still have to vote on it but I’m pretty sure the teachers will say yes. So anyway, there’s some good things happening!!!
item.dc:creator: MadameRainbowPants
